name: Psanan
summary: Volcanic island polity of matriarchal Great Houses, forge industry, underworld exploration, endurance custom, and cyclic renewal under harsh ash and heat conditions.

governance_model.central_core: Great Houses dominate sovereignty, ritual legitimacy, and industrial direction.
subordinate_layers: expedition structures tied to volcanic and underworld routes

bounded_population_signals: field-level support classification preserved in demography layer
runtime packets must not contradict canonical roster
population_status.notes: Drow, Duergar, Deep Gnomes, Kuo-Toa, and Derro form the dominant Underdark base; Humans, Tieflings, and Yuan-Ti remain permanent secondary surface-facing and port-facing populations.

exclusions.note: Dragonborn are shunned in Psanan due to the polity’s deep hatred of dragons.

cultural_posture: Honor, endurance, descent, heat adaptation, and martial-forge prestige define public life.
legal_posture: Law appears house-centered, severe, and bound to survival, forge production, and ritual authority.
magic_posture: Magic is entangled with volcanic conditions, relic depths, and practical survival rather than freely generalized civic use.
religious_posture: Ritual cycles, renewal logic, and house-linked sacred practice remain publicly significant.
economic_posture: Forge output, volcanic resource extraction, and controlled trade windows structure the economy.
military_security_posture: Security posture emphasizes house defense, ash-route hardening, and dangerous-environment readiness.
mobility_settlement_posture: Settlement is concentrated in defensible volcanic nodes, citadels, ports, and underworld access corridors.
major_settlements_or_operating_nodes: ash ports and Great House holdings
unresolved_identity_gaps: Population composition remains unenumerated at nation level in the current repository.
alias_status: Phoenix Island is preserved as deprecated legacy alias material from an older source stratum and is not the active polity name.
exclusion_posture: Dragonborn are shunned in Psanan due to the polity’s deep hatred of dragons.
canon_note: See corresponding demography record for support classification and contradiction-safe reconciliation trail.
